name: Red-Cooked Beef & Carrots
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless beef chuck - cut into 1-inch cubes
3 Green onions & tops - cut into 1-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir beef cubes into a mixture of 2 tablespoons teriyaki sauce and garlic in a bowl; let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Heat oil in a Dutch oven or large skillet over high heat. Lightly brown the beef on all sides.
3. Add 3 cups water, remaining 3 tablespoons teriyaki sauce, and the fennel seed, black pepper, and ground cloves. Cover and simmer for 40 minutes.
4. Add carrots and white parts of green onions. Simmer, covered, for an additional 20 minutes, or until beef and vegetables are tender.
5. In a separate bowl, mix cornstarch with half a cup water. Stir this mixture into the beef mixture along with the green onion tops.
6. Cook until the mixture boils and thickens slightly.
7. Serve over hot noodles.
